expectations.evidence: Response explicitly shows a file structure under src/i18n/ with subdirectories: index.ts, types.ts, context.tsx, locales/, hooks/, utils/, components/
Code includes: export const DEFAULT_LANGUAGE: SupportedLanguage = 'id'

expectations.text: Response creates locale JSON files for id and en
expectations.evidence: Response includes full src/i18n/locales/id.json and src/i18n/locales/en.json with comprehensive translation keys for nav, common, pages, forms, footer, meta, errors, a11y

expectations.text: Response implements useTranslation hook with dotted key paths
expectations.evidence: The useTranslation hook in src/i18n/hooks/use-translation.ts splits key by '.' and traverses the translations object: key.split('.').reduce(...). Usage example shows t('pages.contact.title') and t('footer.copyright', { year: 2026, brand: 'MyApp' })

expectations.text: Response creates LanguageProvider with React context
expectations.evidence: src/i18n/context.tsx creates LanguageContext with createContext and exports LanguageProvider component that wraps children with LanguageContext.Provider, managing language state, translations, and setLanguage function
